# scifi-landscape schema contract: one `<Type>/<yamlKey> <goType>` line per
# serialized field. Frozen: lines may be ADDED but never removed/changed.
# Regenerate after an additive change with:
#   UPDATE_CONTRACT=1 go test ./internal/scene -run TestSchemaContract
config.Algorithms/directors []string
config.Algorithms/generators []string
config.Algorithms/renderers []string
config.Config/algorithms config.Algorithms
config.Config/horizon config.HorizonConfig
config.Config/lighting config.LightingConfig
config.Config/mist config.MistConfig
config.Config/mountains config.MountainConfig
config.Config/perspective config.PerspectiveConfig
config.Config/starDensity config.DensityConfig
config.Config/twinkle config.TwinkleConfig
config.DensityConfig/bias float64
config.DensityConfig/clamp float64
config.DensityConfig/std float64
config.HorizonConfig/max float64
config.HorizonConfig/mean float64
config.HorizonConfig/min float64
config.HorizonConfig/std float64

config.LightingConfig/brightMax float64
config.LightingConfig/brightMin float64
config.LightingConfig/colorSatMax float64
config.LightingConfig/colorSatMin float64
config.LightingConfig/colorValue float64
config.MistConfig/chance float64

config.PerspectiveConfig/lowChance float64

config.PerspectiveConfig/shorePerspHigh float64
config.PerspectiveConfig/shorePerspLow float64
config.PerspectiveConfig/waveNearHigh float64
config.PerspectiveConfig/waveNearLow float64

config.TwinkleConfig/max float64
